$comment: Placeholder fixture for Phase 1.6 exemplar UC; replace with production-grade sample-data as part of Phase 4.5 sandbox validation.
description: Fixture exercising positive scenario for 22.41.2: When a TLS scan reveals a certificate expiring within 21 days, a protocol < TLS 1.2, or a non-AEAD cipher, the UC fires listing host, cert_expires_in, protocol, and cipher.
